title: Outlined Ores+
description: This pack makes it so all of the ores in Minecraft are outlined!
body:
Outlined Ores+ is a lightweight resource pack that adds clean outlines to all ores in Minecraft. It keeps the vanilla look while making ores easier to spot in caves and dark areas.
Features
Clear outlines on all ores
Matches vanilla style
Performance friendly
Ores Included
Coal, Iron, Copper, Gold, Redstone, Lapis Lazuli, Diamond, Emerald, Nether Quartz, Nether Gold, Ancient Debris
Compatibility
Works with vanilla and most modded setups
Installation
Download the pack, place it in the resourcepacks folder, and enable it in-game.
